acceptance_targets: [ch01-booker-001] PASS if the replacement for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:313-365 contains no more than one brief school vignette and does not include a full Zoe confrontation; FAIL if both the lunch text loop and the locker exchange remain at current scope before the signing scene.

[ch01-craft-001] PASS if the replacement span for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:323-367 includes either (a) one concrete second-session beat with a named drill, a physical consequence, and a power move in dialogue, or (b) a clearly stated cancellation reason voiced by a character; FAIL if the narrative still jumps from lunch texts to evening home without either.

[ch01-prose-001] PASS if each cited span uses complete clauses with explicit subjects and verbs and contains no stacked subjectless fragments; FAIL if two or more clipped fragments remain in any one targeted span.

[ch01-dialogue-001] PASS if each targeted exchange has no more than one consecutive reply under four words and includes at least one line that clearly shifts power or reveals intent; FAIL if chains like the current injury Q/A remain functionally unchanged.
[ch01-prose-002] PASS if no targeted paragraph contains a three-beat identical sentence stem; FAIL if any targeted paragraph still repeats the same opening phrase three times.

[ch01-prose-003] PASS if each targeted span contains at least one paragraph with no checklist/timetable diction and clear interpersonal or interior movement; FAIL if both spans remain dominated by sequential schedule/list delivery.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the replacement for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:313-365 contains no more than one brief school vignette and does not include a full Zoe confrontation; FAIL if both the lunch text loop and the locker exchange remain at current scope before the signing scene.
findings.problem: The chapter's emotional peak (post-vomit completion and bus-stop contract pressure) is followed by an extended school block that diffuses end-of-chapter force and pre-spends social-fatigue conflict before the next chapter turn fully lands.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten or restructure the span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:313-365 so the chapter pivots faster from the bus-stop schedule beat (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:305-311) into the signing climax (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:377-399). Keep at most one school-isolation beat here, and reserve the rest of the school-pressure escalation for the next chapter boundary.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the replacement span for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:323-367 includes either (a) one concrete second-session beat with a named drill, a physical consequence, and a power move in dialogue, or (b) a clearly stated cancellation reason voiced by a character; FAIL if the narrative still jumps from lunch texts to evening home without either.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift via summary replacement: the text explicitly promises a 'second session' but cuts directly to evening home, softening the coercive training cost at the exact escalation point where on-page consequence is most needed.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:323 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:367, either render the second session on-page with concrete drill/body detail and father-daughter power dynamics, or add an explicit in-scene cancellation with causal reason and emotional consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited span uses complete clauses with explicit subjects and verbs and contains no stacked subjectless fragments; FAIL if two or more clipped fragments remain in any one targeted span.
findings.problem: Elliptical clipped narration recurs in training passages ('Front-right drop. Recover.' / 'First sequence: ...'), producing telemetry-style prose and violating the constitution's ban on article/subject stripping for terseness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the training fragments at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:219-223, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:259 into grammatically complete clauses while preserving pace through sentence length and punctuation rather than clipping.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted exchange has no more than one consecutive reply under four words and includes at least one line that clearly shifts power or reveals intent; FAIL if chains like the current injury Q/A remain functionally unchanged.
findings.problem: Several high-pressure exchanges slip into transcript cadence with consecutive low-information replies, reducing leverage shifts and flattening character-specific voice under stress.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise dialogue in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:175-187 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:231-237 so brevity remains but at least one turn per exchange introduces motive, threat, vulnerability, or tactical reframing instead of pure call-and-response labels.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no targeted paragraph contains a three-beat identical sentence stem; FAIL if any targeted paragraph still repeats the same opening phrase three times.
findings.problem: A repeated anaphora template ('He does not ...' / 'She thinks of ...') appears in three-beat runs, then recurs later, creating a noticeable prose tic rather than fresh escalation.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:383, keep at most one two-beat anaphora move; replace extra repeated stems with image, action, or syntactic contrast.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted span contains at least one paragraph with no checklist/timetable diction and clear interpersonal or interior movement; FAIL if both spans remain dominated by sequential schedule/list delivery.
findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of schedule/counting diction extends beyond panic beats into reflective beats, flattening tonal variance and making the lexical stress tell feel over-literal.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307-313 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:367-379, retain key schedule facts but rebalance paragraph focus toward relational stakes and embodied reaction, not list-format planning language in consecutive paragraphs.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
